chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.S- 691 of 2022 (Mazhar Zaib vs. Province of Sindh and others) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Before: Irshad Ali Shah J. Fresh Case 1. For orders on CMA No. 4510/2022 2. For orders on office objection No.1 as at A 3. For orders on CMA No. 4511/2022 4. For hearing of main case 03.08.2022 Mr. M.S. Ahsan Khan Ujjan advocate for the petitioner ------------------------------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2&3. Deferred. 4. It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioner that the private respondents are harassing the petitioner to be involved in a false criminal cases, therefore, the official respondents to be directed not to register any FIR against the petitioner at the instance of the private respondents and to produce the record of FIRs, if those have been lodged against the petitioner before this Court. 5. The registration of FIR being legal course could hardly be conditioned with the permission of this Court under the pretext of harassment. If the petitioner is carrying a feeling that he has been involved in criminal cases by the private respondents, then he may have copies of such FIRs from the Courts having jurisdiction, without asking for its production by official respondents before this Court. Consequently, instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. J U D G E
